name: Selariel Dawnblade
notes: Example level-1 High Elf Paladin. High Elf racial bonuses: +2 DEX, +1 INT. Sworn to the Oath of Devotion.

level1Features.name: Divine Sense
level1Features.description: As an action, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 ft that is not behind total cover. Uses = 1 + CHA mod per long rest (3).

level1Features.name: Lay on Hands
level1Features.description: Healing pool of 5 HP. As an action, restore up to 5 HP total. Can expend 5 HP to cure one disease or poison instead.

level1Features.name: Spellcasting
level1Features.description: Paladin spellcasting uses CHA. Spell slots: 2 × 1st level. Prepared spells = CHA mod + half Paladin level (min 1).

level1Features.name: Fey Ancestry
level1Features.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed; can't be magically put to sleep.

level1Features.name: Cantrip (Light)
level1Features.description: High Elf bonus cantrip: Light (CHA-based as Paladin, flavoured as divine radiance).

level1Features.name: Position of Privilege
level1Features.description: Welcome in high society. Common folk make every effort to accommodate you, and other nobility treat you as a peer.

allFeatures.name: Divine Sense
allFeatures.description: As an action, you know the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 ft that is not behind total cover. Uses = 1 + CHA mod per long rest (3).

allFeatures.name: Lay on Hands

allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: Paladin spellcasting uses CHA. Spell slots: 2 × 1st level. Prepared spells = CHA mod + half Paladin level (min 1).

allFeatures.name: Fey Ancestry
allFeatures.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed; can't be magically put to sleep.

allFeatures.name: Position of Privilege

allFeatures.name: Divine Smite
allFeatures.description: After a hit, expend a spell slot to deal 2d8 radiant damage per slot level (max 5d8).

allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: Cast paladin spells using CHA; gain spell slots.

allFeatures.name: Sacred Oath
allFeatures.description: Swear your Sacred Oath and gain its features.

allFeatures.name: Extra Attack
allFeatures.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

allFeatures.name: Aura of Protection
allFeatures.description: Allies within 10 ft (30 ft at level 18) add your CHA modifier to saving throws.

allFeatures.name: Divine Smite
allFeatures.description: After a hit, expend a spell slot to deal 2d8 radiant damage per slot level (max 5d8).

allFeatures.name: Spellcasting
allFeatures.description: Cast paladin spells using CHA; gain spell slots.

allFeatures.name: Sacred Oath
